about.title: About Me
details: I embrace change—when there's a better way, I don't hesitate to refactor and rebuild.
For 5 years I analyzed 100M+ daily transaction records at crypto exchanges, designing anomaly-detection rules and passing Korea's FIU on-site audit with zero findings.

Now at BRFrame, I own the data pipeline for LG Electronics' global AI chatbot (Q-bot) — automating manual batches into a 24-task Airflow pipeline and regenerating flowcharts the OCR missed with GPT Vision to lift retrieval quality.
Defining problems through analysis, building them into pipelines, making them usable through RAG — I own data end to end, from creation to use.

items.title: LG Electronics Global Q-bot — RAG Data Pipeline
items.description: Customer-support RAG chatbot live on LG's official sites across the UK, France, Vietnam and more | Manual batches → 24-task Airflow preprocessing · GPT Vision to overcome Document Intelligence limits · Azure AI Search indexing

items.title: Shannon's Demon Auto-Trading & Time-Series Pipeline
items.description: Real-capital multi-broker auto-trading | 9yr+ 1-min crypto · ~90GB equity time-series built solo | TDD · statistical validation · self-recovery

items.title: Kakao Alimtalk AI Generator
items.description: LangChain/RAG-based AI System | Spring Boot ↔ Flask Integration | Enterprise Project

posts.title: Building a RAG Preprocessing Pipeline

posts.title: Building the Shannon's Demon Trading System
